network_complete.title: Register 5 destinations in your Create Teleporter network — base, End, farm hub, village, and one more

cross_dimension.title: Use the teleporter to travel cross-dimensionally — teleport between Overworld and End in under 5 seconds

subtitle.text: 5 destinations. Cross-dimensional. The void is 5 seconds away. That is what the quantum chain bought you.

description: CH.17 · THE TELEPORTER NETWORK
▸ The teleporter network is the culmination of logistics.
Roads (Via Romana), sea (Small Ships), sky (Elytra),
and now instantaneous point-to-point quantum transport.',
The kingdom you built is connected at every scale.',
A destination registered in the network',
is a place that is always 5 seconds away.',
◈ NETWORK SETUP
└ Teleporter block: placed at each destination',
└ Quantum Mechanism: installed in each teleporter',
└ Registration: right-click teleporter to name it',
All teleporters on the same network share destination list',
└ Fuel: each teleporter needs Quantum Fluid in connected tank',
Chorus farm supply pipeline → Fluid Pump → Tank → Teleporter',
└ Power: SU from main Create network (extend grid to each site)',
◈ RECOMMENDED NETWORK DESTINATIONS
└ Home Base: primary hub, central supply',
└ End Base: outer island farming hub, Enderman + Chorus farms',
└ Farm Hub: agricultural cluster (seasonal farm, vineyard, livestock)',
└ Village Hub: nearest major MCA village, council + trade',
└ Nuclear Site: Create Nuclear Shell test range (safe distance)',
└ Optional: coastal outpost, PTD ritual site, music hall',
◈ CROSS-DIMENSIONAL TRAVEL
└ Create Teleporters supports cross-dimensional teleportation',
(End ↔ Overworld — same network, different dimension marker)',
└ This replaces the 5-minute End portal sequence with 5 seconds',
└ Quantum Fluid consumption: cross-dimensional costs more fuel',
Scale Chorus farm output proportionally',
└ Emergency access: End base teleporter means',
you can return to the End for farm maintenance without
committing to a full End expedition',
▸ Before the portal, the End was far.',
After the portal, it was a one-time trip.',
After the teleporter, it is a supply chain node.',
The dimension that killed 12 previous civilizations',
is now 5 seconds from your kitchen.',
That is what the quantum mechanism actually means.',
▶ Register 5 destinations in the teleporter network [check]
▶ Complete a cross-dimensional teleport (Overworld ↔ End) [check]
◇ Teleporter maintenance: Quantum Fluid refills automatically',
if your supply pipeline is connected.',
Build the pipeline before placing final teleporters.',
A teleporter without fuel is a decorative block.
Build the fuel supply first.
